<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by hw4: do not hand-edit; regenerate instead -->
# bug — byte-range off-by-one

**Symptom:** length 499 for `bytes=0-499 of 1000`, expected 500.

**Root cause:** content length computed `end - start` (end-exclusive) instead of `end - start + 1` (HTTP ranges are inclusive).

**Fix:** add `+ 1`; the spec goes red→green (499→500).

Full report: `results/BUG_ANALYSIS.md`. See [[knowledge-before-after]].
